flash_controller.analytical_notes: The provided document is the ESP32-C6 Datasheet, which only contains high-level architectural overviews, pinouts, and electrical characteristics. It does not contain memory-mapped register base addresses, SPI Flash controller offsets, or BootROM function pointer addresses. Bare-metal flash operations on ESP32 devices strictly require invoking built-in BootROM APIs rather than direct register manipulation due to hardware abstraction, timing, and cache consistency requirements. The sequences below use placeholder ROM calls as the exact numeric addresses are not present in this datasheet. The ESP32-C6 Technical Reference Manual (TRM) and ESP-IDF ROM headers are required to resolve the exact memory addresses.

erase_sector_sequence.desc: Erase a 4KB sector using BootROM API

unlock_sequence.desc: Unlock SPI flash using BootROM API
